title: mentha × piperita var. balsamea
intro: Mentha × piperita var. balsamea, also known as bergamot mint, is a natural hybrid of peppermint (Mentha piperita) and bergamot mint (Mentha citrata), a variety of the peppermint plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to ease digestive issues and reduce nausea. The health benefits of Mentha × piperita var. balsamea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve mental focus, and boost the immune system. Bergamot mint can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in aromatherapy and skincare products due to its calming and antimicrobial properties.
